title: Decision No 1/2024 of the Specialised Committee on Social Security Coordination Established by Article 8(1)(p) of the Trade and Cooperation Agreement between the European Union and the European Atomic Energy Community, of the one part, and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, of the other part,of 8 November 2024 as regards the amendment of certain Annexes to the Protocol on Social Security Coordination
subject: TRADE
